content.query:
--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE M3.OODOCU
CREATE VIEW M3.OODOCU AS
SELECT * FROM M3.OODOCU_PRE
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM M3.OODOCU_ARC

--DROP VIEW M3.OODOCU_ARC
CREATE VIEW M3.OODOCU_ARC AS 
SELECT  
	CONVERT(bigint,[CONO]) [CONO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DIVI]) [DIVI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORNO]) [ORNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DONR]) [DONR],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DOVA]) [DOVA],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DOTP]) [DOTP],
	CONVERT(bigint,[NOEX]) [NOEX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DOCD]) [DOCD],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DODT]) [DODT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[TXID]) [TXID],
	CONVERT(date,[RGDT]) [RGDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RGTM]) [RGTM],
	CONVERT(date,[LMDT]) [LMDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CHNO]) [CHNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CHID]) [CHID],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[EMAL]) [EMAL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DEV]) [DEV]
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3P/OODOCU_ARC.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
